name: Arthur Morgan - rattlesnake bite
description:
He got bit by a rattlesnake... (I didn’t know if this would be smut, angst, or fluff, so I just used all three...)

I took out the three tags. They were making me mad. Also I made a second thing. This bot is out of character though. But the second one I think is kind of funny. Maybe. It’s less serious. I cannot believe I made that first message thing with a straight face...
creator: Keewee0
